# Helpdesk Ticket N8N Notifications - Recommendations

## Overview

**Request**: Receive company emails for EVERY ticket generated by internal helpdesk through @N8N@NAS on MailPlus/DSM package, with full @N8N service for SMS, Telegram, Discord, and Slack (when hiring more humans/volunteers).

## ✅ Implementation Complete

### Notification Channels

1. **Email** ✅
   - Via N8N@NAS MailPlus/DSM package
   - Webhook: `http://10.17.17.32:5678/webhook/helpdesk/email`
   - Status: **ENABLED**

2. **SMS** ✅
   - Via N8N
   - Webhook: `http://10.17.17.32:5678/webhook/helpdesk/sms`
   - Status: **ENABLED**

3. **Telegram** ✅
   - Via N8N
   - Webhook: `http://10.17.17.32:5678/webhook/helpdesk/telegram`
   - Status: **ENABLED**

4. **Discord** ✅
   - Via N8N
   - Webhook: `http://10.17.17.32:5678/webhook/helpdesk/discord`
   - Status: **ENABLED**

5. **Slack** ⏸️
   - Via N8N
   - Webhook: `http://10.17.17.32:5678/webhook/helpdesk/slack`
   - Status: **DISABLED** (Future - when hiring more humans/volunteers)

## Integration

### Automatic Integration
- ✅ Integrated into `jarvis_helpdesk_ticket_system.py`
- ✅ Automatically sends notifications when tickets are created
- ✅ All channels notified simultaneously

### Manual Trigger
```python
from helpdesk_ticket_n8n_notifications import HelpdeskTicketN8NNotifications

notifications = HelpdeskTicketN8NNotifications()
notifications.send_ticket_notification(ticket_data)
```

## N8N Workflow Setup Recommendations

### 1. Email Workflow (MailPlus/DSM)

**Webhook**: `/webhook/helpdesk/email`

**Workflow Steps**:
1. Webhook trigger (receives ticket data)
2. Format email template with ticket details
3. Send via MailPlus/DSM SMTP
4. Log to database

**Email Template**:
```
Subject: [HELPDESK] Ticket {ticket_id}: {title}

Ticket ID: {ticket_id}
Title: {title}
Priority: {priority}
Status: {status}
Category: {category}

Description:
{description}

Team Assignment:
- Team: {team_name}
- Division: {division}
- Manager: {team_manager}
- Technical Lead: {technical_lead}
- Assignee: {primary_assignee}

Created: {created_at}
Created By: {created_by}
```

### 2. SMS Workflow

**Webhook**: `/webhook/helpdesk/sms`

**Workflow Steps**:
1. Webhook trigger
2. Format SMS message (short, concise)
3. Send via SMS provider (Twilio, etc.)
4. Log delivery status

**SMS Template**:
```
[HELPDESK] {ticket_id}: {title} ({priority})
Team: {team_name}
Status: {status}
```

### 3. Telegram Workflow

**Webhook**: `/webhook/helpdesk/telegram`

**Workflow Steps**:
1. Webhook trigger
2. Format Telegram message (Markdown supported)
3. Send to Telegram bot/group
4. Include ticket link if available

**Telegram Template**:
```
🔔 *New Helpdesk Ticket*

*Ticket ID:* `{ticket_id}`
*Title:* {title}
*Priority:* {priority}
*Status:* {status}

*Team:* {team_name}
*Assignee:* {primary_assignee}

{description}
```

### 4. Discord Workflow

**Webhook**: `/webhook/helpdesk/discord`

**Workflow Steps**:
1. Webhook trigger
2. Format Discord embed (rich formatting)
3. Send to Discord webhook
4. Include color coding by priority

**Discord Embed**:
```json
{
  "title": "New Helpdesk Ticket",
  "description": "{description}",
  "color": "{priority_color}",
  "fields": [
    {"name": "Ticket ID", "value": "{ticket_id}"},
    {"name": "Priority", "value": "{priority}"},
    {"name": "Team", "value": "{team_name}"},
    {"name": "Assignee", "value": "{primary_assignee}"}
  ]
}
```

### 5. Slack Workflow (Future)

**Webhook**: `/webhook/helpdesk/slack`

**Status**: Disabled until hiring more humans/volunteers

**When to Enable**:
- When team grows to 5+ real humans
- When community volunteers join
- When Slack workspace is established

**Workflow Steps** (when enabled):
1. Webhook trigger
2. Format Slack message (blocks API)
3. Send to Slack channel
4. Include interactive buttons (view ticket, assign, etc.)

## Configuration

### Enable/Disable Channels

Edit `helpdesk_ticket_n8n_notifications.py`:

```python
self.channels = {
    "email": {"enabled": True, ...},
    "sms": {"enabled": True, ...},
    "telegram": {"enabled": True, ...},
    "discord": {"enabled": True, ...},
    "slack": {"enabled": False, ...}  # Enable when ready
}
```

### N8N Webhook URLs

All webhooks are at: `http://10.17.17.32:5678/webhook/helpdesk/{channel}`

## Testing

### Test Notification
```bash
python helpdesk_ticket_n8n_notifications.py --test
```

### Monitor for New Tickets
```bash
python helpdesk_ticket_n8n_notifications.py --monitor
```

### Enable Slack
```bash
python helpdesk_ticket_n8n_notifications.py --enable-slack
```

## Recommendations

### 1. **Email Priority** ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
- **Highest priority** - Company emails via MailPlus/DSM
- Ensure MailPlus is properly configured on NAS
- Test SMTP settings
- Set up email templates in N8N

### 2. **SMS for Critical Tickets** ⭐⭐⭐⭐
- Use SMS for critical/high priority tickets only
- Avoid SMS spam for low-priority tickets
- Consider rate limiting

### 3. **Telegram for Real-Time** ⭐⭐⭐⭐
- Great for immediate notifications
- Supports rich formatting
- Can create dedicated helpdesk channel

### 4. **Discord for Team Collaboration** ⭐⭐⭐
- Good for team visibility
- Rich embeds look professional
- Can integrate with Discord bots

### 5. **Slack - Future** ⭐⭐
- Enable when team grows
- Better for larger organizations
- More structured communication

## Next Steps

1. **Set up N8N Workflows**:
   - Create workflows for each channel
   - Configure webhooks
   - Test each channel

2. **Configure MailPlus/DSM**:
   - Set up SMTP in MailPlus
   - Test email delivery
   - Configure email templates

3. **Set up SMS Provider**:
   - Choose provider (Twilio, etc.)
   - Configure in N8N
   - Test SMS delivery

4. **Configure Telegram Bot**:
   - Create Telegram bot
   - Get bot token
   - Configure in N8N

5. **Configure Discord Webhook**:
   - Create Discord webhook
   - Configure in N8N
   - Test message delivery

6. **Monitor and Optimize**:
   - Monitor notification delivery
   - Track failures
   - Optimize templates
